decisions.summary: Fix via a deacon reconciler (issue Option 1), not a triggerMerge-gate change (Option 2) or test-role re-dispatch (Option 3). Reconciling the root testStatus makes readyForMerge re-derive true consistently across the dashboard, auto-merge, merge-train, and triggerMerge — whereas Option 2 patches only the merge entry gate and leaves the derived readyForMerge=false everywhere else (UI still shows 'stuck'), and Option 3 re-runs the heavy, slow, gpt-5.5-wedge-prone review+test convoy the issue explicitly wants to avoid.

"Green CI on the current HEAD" MUST be determined from GitHub Actions check-runs (the vitest+playwright suite), NOT from the self-reported panopticon/* commit-statuses. After a rebase the panopticon/test status is exactly the thing that is stuck/absent, so gating on it is circular and the reconciler would never fire. The greenness signal must: require at least one successful CI check-run, treat any pending/incomplete check-run as 'not yet green' (skip, re-check next patrol), and treat any failed check-run as 'do not mark passed'.

Reconciler is unconditional / default-on, matching the sibling reconcilers (reconcileMergedButReviewing, reconcileClosedPrReadyForMerge). No new config flag. Premature testStatus=passed cannot cause a bad merge because triggerMerge Step 3 (runVerificationForIssue('merge-verify')) re-runs the full typecheck/lint/test suite on the rebased branch and aborts on failure — that remains the authoritative quality gate. Operators can still suppress via the existing global deacon freeze.

Candidate predicate for reconciliation: reviewStatus === 'passed' AND testStatus === 'pending' (exactly — never 'testing'/'failed'/'passed'/'skipped') AND mergeStatus is non-terminal (pending/undefined/null, never 'merged'/'merging'/'queued'/'verifying') AND a parseable GitHub PR URL exists. The reconciler touches ONLY testStatus (+ testNotes); it never modifies uatStatus, verificationStatus, reviewStatus, or readyForMerge directly — readyForMerge re-derives itself from the gate state. UAT and verification gates therefore remain authoritative.

Reuse the existing GitHub primitive path (getPullRequestState → headSha) used by reconcileClosedPrReadyForMerge for the current HEAD, and add a check-runs-focused greenness helper rather than relying on getPullRequestState().checksPending/checksFailed (those fold in the combined commit-status /status endpoint, which the absent/stuck panopticon/* statuses contaminate). Guard the whole reconciler on isGitHubAppConfigured(); per-issue throttle map on pending-CI and API-error outcomes to protect the GitHub rate budget; emit an activity action string per reconciled issue, mirroring the sibling reconcilers.

hazards.summary: Circular CI signal: the combined commit-status endpoint (/repos/.../commits/{sha}/status) aggregates the self-reported panopticon/review and panopticon/test contexts. After a rebase those are absent on the new SHA, and GitHub returns combined state='pending' for a commit with zero (or only-pending) statuses. getPullRequestState().checksPending folds that in, so naively reusing it would make checksPending permanently true and the reconciler would never fire — failing to fix the bug.
hazards.mitigation: Drive greenness from the check-runs endpoint (/check-runs) only, ignoring panopticon/* commit-statuses. Require ≥1 successful CI check-run and zero pending/failed check-runs. The work agent should empirically confirm the combined-status-empty behavior on a real rebased PR before finalizing the predicate.

hazards.summary: Never mask a red build. If the reconciler marked testStatus=passed while CI is actually failing or still running, it would let a broken PR be queued for merge.
hazards.mitigation: Mark passed ONLY when CI check-runs are complete AND all-successful AND none failed. Any pending check → skip (re-check next patrol). Any failed check → leave testStatus untouched (the failure/merge-verify paths own that case). triggerMerge Step 3 is the backstop, but the reconciler must not rely on it as an excuse to mark passed on red.

hazards.summary: Stale SHA: checking CI against a cached or pre-rebase SHA could mark passed based on the wrong commit's CI.
hazards.mitigation: Always resolve the CURRENT PR HEAD (getPullRequestState().headSha or gh pr view --json headRefOid) at reconcile time and evaluate check-runs against that exact SHA. Cite the SHA + CI run in testNotes for audit.

hazards.summary: Race with an in-flight rebase or a legitimately running test role. The HEAD SHA is moving during a rebase, and the test role may be mid-flight.
hazards.mitigation: Candidate filter requires testStatus==='pending' exactly (excludes 'testing', so a running test role is never disturbed) and mergeStatus non-terminal (excludes mid-merge). Re-resolving HEAD each patrol + the per-issue throttle means a transient mid-rebase read self-corrects on the next tick.

hazards.summary: GitHub API rate budget: this reconciler adds a per-candidate PR/check-runs lookup every patrol cycle.
hazards.mitigation: Guard on isGitHubAppConfigured(); maintain a per-issue cooldown map (set on pending-CI and on API error, e.g. a few minutes) exactly like reconcileClosedPrReadyForMerge's closedPrReadyReconcileCooldowns, so transient failures don't burn the budget re-polling the same issues each tick.

sessionHistory.content: Planning session for PAN-1658 (orchestration context elided in resume — see original entry). Root cause: setReviewStatusSync dispatches review→test only on the reviewStatus pending→passed transition (review-status.ts:415-433); after a rebase the status is already 'passed' so no transition fires, testStatus stays 'pending', readyForMerge derives false (review-status.ts:259-272), and triggerMerge blocks (workspaces.ts:4673-4683). Fix = a default-on deacon reconciler modeled on reconcileClosedPrReadyForMerge (deacon.ts:3333) that, for reviewStatus=passed && testStatus=pending issues with green GitHub Actions CI check-runs on the current PR HEAD, sets testStatus=passed citing the CI run.
sessionHistory.note: Planning session started for PAN-1658: bug(pipeline): testStatus stuck 'pending' after rebase/force-push despite green CI — blocks merge, no reconciler
Auto-planning complete: 3 beads (CI-greenness helper → reconciler+wiring → unit tests). Approach = Option 1 (deacon reconciler). Ready for pan plan finalize.
